questions.question: Main idea: "Elizabeth Blackwell was the first woman doctor in the U.S." Which sentence BEST supports this?
choices: Blackwell lost her sight in one eye.
Blackwell graduated from Geneva Medical College in 1849.
Blackwell was born in Bristol in 1821.
questions.explanation: Graduating from medical college DIRECTLY supports being a doctor.

questions.question: Read: "The Amazon rainforest has incredible variety of life. ______. 400 species of mammals live there. 3,000 species of fish in the rivers." Best fill?
choices: The Amazon River is very long.
Rainforests get a lot of rain.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT belong in a paragraph about recycling? (A) Recycling helps the environment. (B) It reduces landfill waste. (C) My neighbor has three bins. (D) It conserves natural resources.
questions.explanation: C is a personal detail, not a benefit.

questions.question: Best topic sentence for a paragraph about benefits of reading:
choices: Reading regularly strengthens vocabulary, focus, and creativity.
Some books are fiction, some nonfiction.
questions.explanation: States claim and previews three benefits.

questions.question: Best conclusion for a paragraph about sleep importance for students:
choices: Sleep is one of many things.
Getting enough sleep helps students perform better and feel healthier.

questions.question: Read: "Regular exercise has many benefits. It strengthens muscles. ______. It also reduces stress and improves mood." Best fill?
choices: It improves heart health and helps maintain weight.

questions.question: Best topic sentence for paragraph about why dogs make good companions for children:
choices: Dogs are excellent companions for children — loyal, playful, protective.
Some dogs are big, some small.

questions.question: Read: "Bicycles are great. They are environmentally friendly. They help fitness. ______." Best concluder?
choices: For all these reasons, bikes are smart for daily transportation.
My friend has a red bike.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT belong in paragraph about saving water? (A) Saving water helps the environment. (B) Turning off the tap saves gallons. (C) I love swimming. (D) Fixing leaks saves thousands.
Best opening for a paragraph about kites:
choices: Kites have been beloved across cultures for thousands of years.
Diamond kites and box kites exist.

questions.question: Main idea: "Bicycles are useful in cities." Which BEST supports?
choices: Bikes help people avoid traffic and arrive quickly.

questions.question: Read: "Dolphins are intelligent. They can solve puzzles. ______. They communicate using clicks and whistles." Best fill?
choices: They use tools to forage for food.

questions.question: Topic sentence for paragraph about why exercise improves grades:
choices: Exercise improves grades by boosting focus, sleep, and brain health.

questions.question: Best supporting detail for: "Volcanoes can be dangerous."
choices: Volcanic eruptions can destroy entire towns.

questions.question: Read: "Brushing your teeth daily is important. It prevents cavities. ______. It keeps breath fresh." Best fill?
Best topic for paragraph about library benefits:
choices: Libraries provide free access to books, computers, and learning programs.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT support: "Computers help students learn"?
choices: Computers can show videos that explain hard topics.
Students can practice math on apps.

questions.question: Topic: "Recycling matters." Best supporting detail?
choices: Recycling reduces the amount of trash going to landfills.
I take out recycling on Tuesdays.

questions.question: Best topic sentence for paragraph about saving energy at home:
choices: My dad pays the electric bill.
Saving energy at home cuts costs and helps the environment.

questions.question: Read: "Pets are companions. They reduce loneliness. ______. They give children responsibility." Best fill?
choices: They teach kids about empathy and care.

questions.question: Topic: "Eating breakfast helps performance." Best supporting?
choices: Studies show students who eat breakfast score higher on tests.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT support: "Trees are essential to life"?
Best topic for paragraph about why volunteering helps you:
choices: Volunteering builds skills, expands networks, and creates a sense of purpose.

questions.question: Read: "Studying in groups has advantages. You can ask questions. ______. Group members motivate each other." Best fill?
Topic: "Owning a pet teaches responsibility." Best supporting?
choices: Owners must feed, walk, and care for pets daily, building habits of responsibility.

questions.question: Best opening sentence for paragraph about oceans:
choices: Oceans cover more than 70% of Earth's surface and play a vital role in our planet's health.

questions.question: Which does NOT support: "Reading improves your writing"?
choices: You learn new vocabulary from books.
You see how good writers structure sentences.
Reading shows you how to use punctuation correctly.

questions.question: Best topic for paragraph about benefits of teamwork:
choices: Teamwork combines strengths, divides work, and builds trust.

questions.question: Topic: "Bees are vital to agriculture." Best supporting?
choices: Bees pollinate one-third of all crops humans eat.
Some people are afraid of bees.

questions.question: Read: "Drinking water is important. It helps your brain. ______. It keeps your skin healthy." Best fill?
choices: It also keeps your muscles working properly.

questions.question: Best concluder for paragraph about benefits of music classes in school:
choices: Music classes give students lifelong skills, joy, and academic benefits.

questions.question: Which sentence is the BEST topic sentence for a paragraph about mountain climbing?
choices: I want to climb a mountain.
Mountain climbing is dangerous but rewarding.
questions.explanation: States position the paragraph can develop.

questions.question: Read: "Forest fires harm wildlife. Animals lose their habitats. ______. Plants take years to grow back." Best fill?
choices: Many animals don't escape and are killed.

questions.question: Topic: "Healthy eating affects your mood." Best supporting?
choices: Foods rich in vitamins help your brain produce mood-stabilizing chemicals.

questions.question: Best topic for paragraph about reasons to recycle:
choices: Recycling saves resources, reduces pollution, and creates jobs.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT belong in paragraph about chess strategy? (A) Chess requires planning. (B) Good players think 5 moves ahead. (C) My uncle plays chess. (D) Beginners often forget about defense.
Best supporting detail for: "Practice improves performance."
choices: Studies show that 100 hours of practice can move a beginner to intermediate.

questions.question: Topic: "School lunches need improvement." Best supporting?
choices: Many cafeteria meals lack the fruits and vegetables kids need to grow.

questions.question: Best opening for paragraph about effects of pollution on oceans:
choices: Pollution is harming our oceans in serious and lasting ways.

questions.question: Read: "Spending time outside is healthy. Sunshine gives you vitamin D. ______. Walking outdoors is good exercise." Best fill?
choices: Fresh air helps your mood and energy.

questions.question: Which is the BEST conclusion for paragraph about why kids should help with chores?
choices: By doing chores, kids learn responsibility and contribute to their families.

questions.question: Topic: "Music is a universal language." Best supporting?
choices: People around the world enjoy music even if they speak different languages.

questions.question: Best topic for paragraph about benefits of bilingual education:
choices: Bilingual education boosts brain development, opens job opportunities, and connects cultures.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT belong in a paragraph about polar bears? (A) Polar bears live in the Arctic. (B) Their fur is white. (C) My favorite color is blue. (D) They hunt seals.
Best supporting detail for: "Antarctica is the coldest place on Earth."
Topic: "Cooking is a useful skill." Best supporting?
choices: Cooking saves money and teaches you about nutrition.

questions.question: Best topic for paragraph about how to study effectively:
choices: Effective study uses planning, breaks, and active review.

questions.question: Read: "Visiting museums teaches you a lot. Art exhibits inspire creativity. ______. Interactive displays make learning fun." Best fill?
choices: History exhibits show how past people lived.

questions.question: Best topic for paragraph about benefits of journal writing:
choices: Journal writing helps you process emotions, remember experiences, and improve writing.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT support: "Kindness helps your community"?
choices: A friendly hello can brighten someone's day.
Helping others reduces loneliness in your area.

questions.question: Best concluder for paragraph about why kids should learn coding:
choices: Learning to code prepares kids for the jobs of tomorrow and teaches problem-solving.

questions.question: Topic: "Walking is great exercise." Best supporting?
choices: Walking 30 minutes a day reduces heart disease risk.

questions.question: Best opening for paragraph about why kids should read fiction:
choices: Reading fiction develops empathy, expands vocabulary, and builds imagination.

questions.question: Which is the BEST topic sentence for a paragraph about taking care of plants?
choices: Caring for plants requires attention to water, light, and soil quality.
questions.explanation: Lists three care areas the paragraph can develop.

questions.question: Read: "Sharing helps relationships. It builds trust. ______. It makes others feel valued." Best fill?
choices: It makes problems easier to solve together.

questions.question: Topic: "Dolphins are highly intelligent." Best supporting?
choices: Dolphins can solve complex puzzles and use tools, demonstrating high intelligence.

questions.question: Which sentence does NOT belong in paragraph about exercise? (A) Exercise builds muscle. (B) Exercise improves mood. (C) Exercise reduces disease risk. (D) My friend got new shoes.
Best topic for paragraph about caring for a community garden:
choices: Maintaining a community garden requires teamwork, planning, and consistent effort.

questions.question: Read: "Camping is a great experience. You learn outdoor skills. ______. You disconnect from screens." Best fill?
choices: You bond with friends or family in nature.

questions.question: Best supporting detail for: "Honeybee populations are declining."
choices: Pesticide use has caused bee populations to drop by 40% in some regions.
